channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: World Series champion Dodgers top MLB luxury tax at $103 million as record 9 teams owe penalty
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers topped a record nine teams owing Major League Baseball's luxury tax this year with an unprecedented $103 million penalty, and the $97.1 million bill for the New York Mets raises their tax total under high-spending owner Steve Cohen to nearly $229 million.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 49ers’ Brock Purdy spreads holiday cheer, gets SUVs for his offensive line
item.description: 49ers' quarterback Brock Purdy treats his offensive line to new SUVs: `You guys can check 'em out. These are yours.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Former NFL star Michael Vick officially hired by Norfolk State on Friday
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — Norfolk State officially named Michael Vick its head football coach Friday, the latest hire of a talented NFL player with no college coaching experience to lead an HBCU program.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Carter, McGrady and Altidore's new stake in Buffalo Bills brings diversity to NFL owners' table
item.description: The chance to rub shoulders with quarterback Josh Allen and broaden the Buffalo Bills’ reach into Toronto wasn’t the only thing on the minds of former NBA stars Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady and soccer’s Jozy Altidore in purchasing a minority share of the franchise.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trevor Baskin: From Division II star to Division I grinder
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — From Division II standout to Division I contributor, Trevor Baskin’s basketball journey has been anything but ordinary. After excelling at Colorado Mesa University, Baskin now competes at the highest level of college basketball with the Colorado Buffaloes.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: La Jolla 55, Army-Navy 47
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in La Jolla with the Vikings hosting Army-Navy from Carlsbad. Great game that went right down to the wire, La Jolla won 52-47. Vikings were lead by Leo Hawkinson with 16. Warriors were lead by Yanler Ramos game high 26 points.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: The lawsuit claims an illegal hit from Crawford during a game on Feb. 19, 2023, has caused her serious long-term issues.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Guentzel scores in 7 consecutive games, 1 shy of matching the franchise record in Tuesday's win against Blue Jackets
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Nick Paul had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 5-3 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets. Jake Guentzel, Luke Glendening, Brayden Point and Mitchell Chaffee also scored for Tampa Bay, which has won five of six. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 28 saves.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes roll past Florida A&M, 89-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's last home game of 2024 was a memorable one, as the Utes cruised past Florida A&M, 89-59. Mike Sharavjamts and Mason Madsen each scored 15 points off the bench to lead a balanced Utah attack. The Utes bench scored 57 points, while the starters scored 32.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: The Chicago Bears have no fire in the trenches
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — When it comes to what's wrong with the Chicago Bears, some argue it's coaching. Others dare to say it's Caleb Williams. Most toss it up to organizational dysfunction, or some supernatural hex inadvertently brought about by the McCaskeys being the McCaskeys.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 84-year-old continues lawn bowling despite vision loss
item.description: On most days, you can find Ralph Trinity rolling with the Oaks North Lawn Bowling Club in Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Rays call for more money after Pinellas commissioners vote in favor of bonds for new stadium
item.description: Pinellas County commissioners voted in favor of approving bonds for the new Tampa Bay Rays stadium Tuesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vucevic scores 24 points as Bulls hold off Raptors 122-121 for 4th win in 6 games
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 24 points, Coby White added 19 and the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Toronto Raptors 122-121 on Monday night for their fourth win in six games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears at Vikings preview: Injury updates, a look into recent matchups, and more
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS, Minn. (WGN) — The Chicago Bears travel to Minneapolis for Monday Night Football to face a surging Minnesota Vikings team that's won six straight and has a chance to tie the Detroit Lions for the NFC North lead in front of a national audience.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers suspend De'Vondre Campbell for 3 games
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers have suspended linebacker De'Vondre Campbell after he refused to play in Thursday’s game against the Los Angeles Rams, General Manager John Lynch announced Monday. The suspension is for the team's final three games of the season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Saquon Barkley slowed by 'minor' injury, loses ground in pursuit of Dickerson's record
item.description: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley had a setback in his chase of the NFL season rushing record when he appeared slowed by an undisclosed injury.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield throws for 4 TDs, including 2 to Evans, as Bucs dominate second half to rout Chargers 40-17
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 288 yards and four touchdown passes, Mike Evans had a season-high 159 receiving yards and two scores and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers dominated the second half en route to a 40-17 victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Giants owner John Mara gets another aerial message trashing his team before loss to Ravens
item.description: New York Giants co-owner John Mara received another aerial message trashing his woeful team before Sunday's 35-14 loss to the Baltimore Ravens. It was the second straight week that a plane was hired to circle the stadium in protest of the Giants’ seventh losing season since 2017.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The only thing the Chiefs had to worry about in the final minutes Sunday was Patrick Mahomes' ankle.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Miami Dolphins wide receiver Grant DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head
item.description: Grant DuBose, who returned Sunday after a shoulder injury sidelined him for part of the season, was listed as being in stable condition.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
